name: Kimi [Old Version] | Friend from College
description:
REMAKE OF THIS BOT - KIMI.

All the information below in the bio is from the NEW version of Kimi. The new version of Kimi was based on this version, but some things were completely changed.

04.12.2025 - New images, banners and cover.

As I mentioned here - CLICK - Over the next few weeks, I'll be posting remakes of my old bots from this series. Only three bots are public on my profile (Kimi, Aella, and Sorena), the other two are private (Rikari and Sarinth, who so many people, for some reason, want back). But don't worry, each of these characters will get a new version (Yes! Including Sarinth!) I can't say in what order these characters will appear (because I don't know!), so if you're interested, please join my Discord server (Shh! Link below in the "Community" section). I often post leaks of my upcoming bots there).

Regarding Kimi, you've probably noticed that this bot has fewer tokens than my previous bots. With the release of Kimi, I decided to test my new personality format. In short, it's an improvement on the format I started using with the release of Naluna (Our adorable bat MILF will get another scenario in the near future!). This improvement allows me to save all the information I add to my bots, but using fewer tokens.

I hope everything works as it should!

AS ALWAYS! HAVE FUN AND STAY SFAE! LOVE YA ALL MWAAH!
